name: Radix UI
description: Unstyled, accessible React primitives for building high-quality design systems and web apps

description.value: Unstyled, accessible React primitives for building high-quality design systems and web apps

license.comment: Open source MIT license, Copyright © 2022-present WorkOS

latest-release.comment: v1.4.3 published approximately 4 months ago as of December 2025

framework.comment: React exclusive, works with Next.js, Remix, and other React frameworks

styling-approach.comment: Completely unstyled primitives, compatible with any styling solution (CSS-in-JS, Tailwind, CSS modules, etc.)

component-model.comment: Headless component library providing behavior and accessibility without styles

typescript.comment: Fully-typed API with first-class TypeScript support, 95.5% TypeScript codebase

ssr-compatible.comment: Works with server-side rendering (Next.js, Remix, Gatsby). React 18+ handles hydration IDs automatically

rsc-compatible.comment: Components require 'use client' directive in Next.js App Router; not natively RSC-compatible as they are interactive client components

design-system.comment: Headless library with no design system; users implement their own (note: Radix Themes is a separate styled product)

dark-mode.comment: Primitives are unstyled - dark mode implementation is user's responsibility

theming-system.comment: No built-in theming system - unstyled components allow complete custom theming

css-variables.comment: Primitives don't include CSS variables; users can implement their own (note: Radix Themes has CSS variables)

design-tokens.comment: No design tokens provided - headless library focused on behavior and accessibility

rtl-support.comment: RTL support via Direction Provider with dir='rtl' prop wrapping the application

component-count.comment: 30+ components including stable and preview primitives (Accordion, Dialog, Select, Toast, etc.) plus 5 utilities

text-input.comment: Headless library focuses on complex components; basic inputs expected to be native HTML

textarea.comment: Not provided - use native HTML textarea

select.comment: Custom Select component with accessibility, keyboard navigation, and typeahead

combobox.comment: Not provided as separate primitive; can be built with Popover + custom filtering logic

checkbox.comment: Checkbox component with indeterminate state support

radio.comment: Radio Group component for radio button groups

switch-toggle.comment: Switch component for boolean toggle values

slider.comment: Range slider with single or dual-thumb support, keyboard and touch input, RTL direction

number-input.comment: Not provided - use native HTML number input

pin-input.comment: One-Time Password Field (preview) for OTP/PIN code entry

date-picker.comment: Not currently available; team has indicated 'this is something we will introduce to the library eventually'

input-groups.comment: Not provided as a distinct component

input-with-dropdown.comment: Not provided, but can be composed using Select or Popover

button-groups.comment: Toggle Group acts as segmented button control

split-button.comment: Not provided, but can be composed with Dropdown Menu

table.comment: Not provided - use native HTML table or community libraries; feature request exists

data-table.comment: Not provided - use community solutions like TanStack Table

virtual-infinite-list.comment: Not provided - use libraries like TanStack Virtual or react-window

tree-view.comment: Not provided (note: Radix Vue has Tree component, but React version does not)

card.comment: Not provided - layout component beyond primitive scope

avatar.comment: Avatar with image and fallback support, automatic/manual loading states

badge.comment: Not provided - simple display component beyond primitive scope

calendar.comment: Not provided (note: Radix Vue has Calendar, but React version does not yet)

alert.comment: Not provided as static alert; Alert Dialog available for modal alerts

toast-notification.comment: Toast component with auto-dismiss, swipe gestures, custom action buttons, and viewport management

progress-bar.comment: Linear progress indicator with ARIA progressbar role, supports indeterminate state

progress-circle.comment: Not provided; Progress component is linear only

spinner-loader.comment: Not provided - simple presentation component beyond primitive scope

modal-dialog.comment: Dialog and Alert Dialog components with focus trapping, focus restoration, and scroll lock

drawer-sheet.comment: Not provided as distinct primitive; Dialog can be styled as drawer/sheet

popover.comment: Floating content anchored to trigger with collision detection and focus management

tooltip.comment: Hover hint component with configurable delay and accessibility support

dropdown-menu.comment: Action menu with keyboard navigation, submenus, checkboxes, and radio items

context-menu.comment: Right-click context menu with keyboard support and nested menus

command-palette.comment: Not provided; can be composed with Dialog and custom search/filter logic

tabs.comment: Tab-based content switching with keyboard navigation and ARIA support

vertical-tabs.comment: Tabs component supports both horizontal and vertical orientation via orientation prop

breadcrumb.comment: Not provided - navigation component beyond primitive scope

pagination.comment: Not provided (note: Radix Vue has Pagination, but React version does not)

navigation-menu.comment: Site navigation with dropdown support, keyboard navigation, and viewport management

sidebar.comment: Not provided; use Collapsible or custom implementation

grid.comment: Not provided - CSS layout beyond primitive scope

stack.comment: Not provided - CSS layout beyond primitive scope

container.comment: Not provided - CSS layout beyond primitive scope

divider.comment: Separator component for horizontal/vertical dividers with ARIA separator role

aspect-ratio.comment: Maintain aspect ratio container for responsive media

collapsible.comment: Expandable/collapsible content section with animation support

resizable.comment: Not provided (note: Radix Vue has Splitter, but React version does not)

splitter.comment: Not provided (note: Radix Vue has Splitter, but React version does not)

form-libraries.comment: Works with React Hook Form via Controller component; shadcn/ui demonstrates integration pattern. Radix's Form primitive is standalone and not meant to be used with RHF

animation-libraries.comment: Official Motion (Framer Motion) integration documented; supports forceMount for exit animations with AnimatePresence

icon-libraries.comment: Radix Icons library (333+ icons) by WorkOS team; Accessible Icon utility for adding labels

date-libraries.comment: No date picker components yet, so no date library integrations (note: Radix Vue uses @internationalized/date)

aria-compliant.comment: Adheres to WAI-ARIA design patterns with automatic aria and role attributes

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard navigation support across all interactive components with expected interaction patterns

screen-reader-tested.comment: Tested in modern browsers and assistive technologies; professional audit by Publicis Sapient identified 35 accessibility issues across components

focus-management.comment: Automatic focus management including focus trapping in modals, programmatic focus movement, and focus restoration

wcag-level.comment: No specific WCAG level documented; follows WAI-ARIA patterns; independent audit found 35 accessibility issues ranging from P1 (critical) to P3 (moderate)

accessibility-rating.comment: Good - WAI-ARIA compliant, keyboard navigation, screen reader tested, focus management, but professional audit identified issues that remain unresolved as of 2025

bundle-size-full.comment: Not applicable - Radix UI is installed as individual component packages, not as single bundle

bundle-size-core.comment: Individual components ~50kb minified (not gzipped); Dialog example ~50kb. Tree-shakeable when importing specific components

tree-shakeable.comment: Package is tree-shakeable with sideEffects: false; import individual components to minimize bundle size

zero-runtime.comment: JavaScript runtime required for component behavior and accessibility

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be imported individually and loaded on demand with code splitting

documentation-quality.comment: Excellent - comprehensive API docs, interactive examples, guides for composition/animation/SSR/accessibility, keyboard reference, detailed prop documentation

interactive-docs.comment: Documentation includes interactive component examples with live code editors

storybook.comment: No official Storybook; community projects exist that convert Radix primitives to Storybook stories

figma-kit.comment: Multiple Figma community files: official Radix Themes kit, Radix Unstyled, and Radix + TailwindCSS components

cli-generator.comment: No official CLI; community tool 'radix-select' provides interactive component selection interface

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: 23.6M weekly downloads for @radix-ui/primitive (shared dependency across all components); radix-ui package: 555k weekly downloads

active-maintenance.comment: Active - 1,661 commits, v1.4.3 published ~4 months ago (August 2025), maintained by WorkOS team

commercial-support.comment: Open source MIT licensed, maintained by WorkOS but no commercial support tier. WorkOS uses Radix in their enterprise products (AuthKit)

style-override.comment: Class attributes for styling, data-state/data-disabled attributes for state-based styling; users can implement CSS variables

compound-components.comment: Extensive use of compound component pattern (e.g., Dialog.Root, Dialog.Trigger, Dialog.Content) for composability

render-props.comment: Uses children composition and asChild pattern rather than traditional render props

slots.comment: Slot utility component enables asChild pattern for flexible composition; merges props onto child elements

unstyled-mode.comment: Entirely unstyled by default - headless component library providing only behavior and accessibility
